title: eriogonum kennedyi var. austromontanum
intro: Eriogonum kennedyi var. austromontanum, also known as Kennedy's buckwheat or Austromontane buckwheat, is a variety of the Eriogonum kennedyi species, a flowering plant native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. The plant is used in herbal medicine for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Eriogonum kennedyi var. austromontanum include reducing inflammation and pain, improving immune function, and supporting cardiovascular health. Eriogonum kennedyi var. austromontanum can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, and is often used in traditional folk medicine to treat wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues.
